title: Chapter 11
content:

She was clearly feeling it and wanted the next club inserted quickly.

I felt like I was going insane from cumming.

For someone who could barely manage two consecutive masturbations back in Japan, this was an unbearably intense string of climaxes.

But I couldn’t lose my mind.

Lucia still hadn’t cum even once. There was no way I’d tap out before her.

I cupped my hands and scooped up a large amount of love juice from her pussy, then smeared it all over her asshole. The insertion efficiency of the clubs improved dramatically.

Also...

Was it intestinal fluid? Her asshole itself seemed to be getting wet.

Lucia might actually have a real talent for anal.

"Lucia, your asshole is getting soaking wet. You perverted, lewd female dragon. You’re already feeling it from your very first anal experience!"

"Haa... haa..."

Even when I tried dirty talk, she only responded with heavy breathing. No actual reply.

She was definitely feeling it.

Yet here was a girl who had never even cum from masturbation until yesterday, already starting to feel it anally. What terrifying talent.

I continued inserting clubs.

After fifty or so, I stopped counting.

I kept attacking her divine asshole with gratitude, and when the clubs around us finally ran out...

*Kon...*

The tip of the next club bumped against the handle of the previous one and wouldn’t go any deeper.

"Lucia?"

I pushed the area around her anus with my hands...

*munyun...*

The flesh around her asshole, which had been as hard as steel at the beginning, had become as soft and springy as gummy candy.

"Amazing. Your asshole has turned completely soft and sloppy."

Kuh... It felt like I was doing strength training by prying open a round object.

Come to think of it, I never managed to buy that popular fitness game from the company famous for Super Manko Brothers.

But I have no regrets.

Take a deep breath——

Hold for 5 seconds, then slowly release the tension while exhaling.

Be careful not to injure the anus.

Yes.

Yes.

...

Last one. Don’t lose focus.

"Alright... It’s nicely loosened up!"

She might be completely tripped out and unable to hear me, but I warned her anyway.

Before Lucia could fully process what I said, I yanked out one of the clubs.

And that seemed to be the limit of her divine asshole.

Like a broken dam, the thick spiked clubs began shooting out one after another with wet *buryu, buryu* sounds. The force was so strong that the clubs stabbed into the ground upon impact.

Frankly, this was beyond siege weaponry. If one hit me, my torso would probably be obliterated.

I ran for my life.

*Dosun! Dosun!* The sounds of anal cannon fire continued.

The impact made my feet leave the ground and I fell over.

Lucia lay on her back with all four limbs pointing toward the sky, twitching violently.

She had definitely cum!

You did it, Lucia!

*Plop—*

"Rain?"

*Plop plop plop... ZAAAAAAAaaaaaaa!*

It wasn’t rain. The giant dragon was squirting massively!

The golden tidal wave, sparkling under the moonlight, quietly enveloped the entire forest.

My penis — its veins bulging dark from dozens of consecutive ejaculations — was soothed by Lucia’s squirt. While being bathed in her tidal spray, I fell asleep with a deep sense of satisfaction.
